tier_1.bdr_summary: Executive intelligence platform for AI workforce transformation consultants to generate client reports and dashboards measuring AI adoption impact on business performance
tier_1.approved_scope: Manual intelligence dashboard for workforce consultants to input client data and generate executive reports

tier_2.bdr_summary: Executive intelligence platform connecting AI adoption metrics, workforce development KPIs, and business performance for consultants serving enterprise clients. Generates executive-ready reports with standardized scoring and risk indicators.
tier_2.approved_scope: Executive intelligence platform with role-based access, dashboard, structured data input, KPI scoring engine, and automated report generation for workforce transformation consultants.

tier_1.target_customer: AI Learning Consultants and fractional CLOs serving enterprise clients
tier_1.acquisition_channel: Direct consultant outreach and executive referrals

tier_2.target_customer: AI Learning Consultants and fractional CLOs serving enterprise clients
tier_2.acquisition_channel: Direct consultant outreach and executive referrals
tier_2.audience_scale_guess: 500-1000 qualified consultants in workforce transformation space
